* {{ill|Tenshō Kōtai Shrine|ja|天照皇大神社 (伊東市)}} – Shizuoka Prefecture, {{ill|Itō|ja|伊東市}} Shibamachi: Kusumi Shrine * {{ill|Kōtai Shrine|ja|皇大神社 (福知山市)|lt=Kotai Shrine (Fukuchiyama)}} – Kyoto Prefecture, {{ill|Fukuchiyama|ja|福知山市}} Ōe-chō Naikū: Motoise Kōdaijingū * {{ill|Obama Kōtai Shrine|ja|小浜皇大神社}} – Hyōgo Prefecture, {{ill|Takarazuka|ja|宝塚市}} Obama * {{ill|Kōtai Shrine (Hiramatsuchō, Nara)|ja|皇大神社 (奈良市平松町)|lt=Kōtai Shrine (Hiramatsuchō, Nara)}} – Nara Prefecture, {{ill|Nara|ja|奈良市}} Hiramatsuchō * {{ill|Kōtai Shrine (Shijōōji, Nara)|ja|皇大神社 (奈良市四条大路)|lt=Kōtai Shrine (Shijōōji, Nara)}} – Nara Prefecture, Nara City Shijōōji
